summary: Built the Zo2Zo capability with a trust registry (reads security.yaml trusted_instances, returns trust level), parent link protocol (packages escalation requests with decision context, creates memory decisions), and skill receiver (validates bundle format, dry-run install). All actions audit-logged. All 4 scenarios pass.
decisions: add_trusted() returns False — trust list changes require human action
Skill install is dry-run only in Layer 1
broadcast: Zo2Zo API: verify_trust(instance) → TrustResult. prepare_escalation(summary, context, options) → EscalationRequest. validate_bundle(bundle) → ValidationResult. install_bundle(bundle, dry_run=True).
